title: Alchemy Deckbuilder
idea: Alchemy deckbuilding roguelite

title: Logistics Flow
idea: Delivery and logistics flow optimization deckbuilder

title: Magic Academy: Spell Synthesis
idea: Magic Academy card synthesis battle (same-type spells merge into amplified effects)

title: Circuit Breaker
idea: Hacking deckbuilder: stack same-type code cards; when stack reaches burden threshold, it COLLAPSES for amplified burst effect.

title: Calamity Dice
idea: Dice battler: roll elemental dice, pick one element per turn. Channeled dice enter log and return next turn, building an avalanche of power. Manage heat to avoid feedback damage.

title: Power Grid
idea: Power plant deckbuilder: manage 3 generators, play cards to boost output and control heat. Trigger chain overloads for massive score multipliers.

title: OVERLOAD
idea: Power core survival auto-shooter: manage charge meter for fire rate boost, trigger screen-clearing OVERLOAD at HP cost. Chain reactions cascade through enemies.

title: Fork Bomb
idea: Dice-splitting circuit battler: route signal dice through 3 lanes, split values across paths, and recombine matching adjacent values for multiplied burst damage.

title: Viral Cascade
idea: Hacking-themed cellular automaton grid battler: inject viruses, watch them spread, harvest connected clusters for chain damage. Overflow risk if clusters grow too large.

title: Synth Surge
idea: Auto-shooter with color-match synthesis: collect 3 same-color shards to trigger super abilities (screen wipe, freeze, heal, overdrive). Risk/reward shard positioning.

title: Alchemy Drop
idea: Falling-block puzzle: stack elemental blocks, match 3+ to clear, chain reactions cascade for score multipliers. Reinterpreted from alchemy synthesis idea.

title: Mining Front
idea: Lane-based tower defense: place mining turrets, chain adjacent reactors for amplified damage, manage ore economy across 10 waves. Reinterpreted from space-mining deckbuilder idea.

title: FORESIGHT
idea: Grid survival: spend future knowledge to attack. Your vision of upcoming enemy spawns is the resource you spend. Reinterpreted from dice/bag roguelite idea (cost = future hand, not HP).

title: CHROMA BREAK
idea: Color-match breakout: paddle cycles through 4 elements, ball only damages matching-color bricks, consecutive same-color breaks build COMBO for piercing SUPER BALL. Reinterpreted from alchemy synthesis idea (score 31.65).

title: Element Drop
idea: Pachinko/Peggle ball-drop with alchemy synthesis: consecutive same-element peg hits double the combo multiplier. Reinterpreted from alchemy synthesis idea (score 31.65).

title: Gravity Well
idea: Orbital survival: capture drifting mass into orbit, then trigger chain collapse for combo score. Manage heat from orbiting mass. Reinterpreted from alchemy dice/bag roguelite idea (score 32.2) with resonance echoes from movement trail.

title: CHAIN VAULT
idea: Color-chain platformer: jump between platforms, chain same-colored landings to trigger cascading SHATTER for massive score. Reinterpreted from hacking auto-shooter idea (score 31.55) with chain propagation + one-color constraint hooks.

title: ORE SERPENT
idea: Snake-like mining: navigate a growing drill-serpent, collect same-color ores consecutively for COMBO multiplier. Body constrains movement — longer = more risk. Reinterpreted from auto-shooter/space-mining idea (score 32.2) with log/replay as assets hook.

title: CHAIN REACTOR
idea: Top-down arena shooter: destroy one enemy to trigger cascading same-color chain reactions. Reinterpreted from deckbuilder idea (score 31.95) with chain propagation + one-color-per-action hooks.

title: ECHO DRIFT
idea: Grid-based top-down racer: leave colored echo trail on track, re-entering same-color cells triggers COMBO chain multipliers while building dangerous heat. DISCHARGE to clear. Reinterpreted from auto-shooter/power-plant idea (score 32.15) with log/replay → echo trail, CA grid → volatile spread hooks.

title: THRUST CHAIN
idea: Lunar lander with color-matched combo chains: land on same-color pads consecutively for COMBO multipliers while managing fuel, HP, and gravity. Reinterpreted from deckbuilder/logistics idea (score 32.15) with circuit/pipe flow → color chain, split/converge → combo jackpot hooks.

title: CALAMITY SIEGE
idea: Space-invaders style gallery shooter: contain enemies before they breach. Same-color combo unlocks piercing laser. Reinterpreted from calamity sealing deckbuilder idea (score 32.05).

title: CELL SURGE
idea: Grid territory control: place colored seeds that spread via cellular automaton. Contiguous same-color regions synthesize into fortress NODES. Compete against enemy spread from edges. Reinterpreted from dice/bag roguelite idea (score 32.35) with CA grid spread + synthesis compression hooks.

title: CHROMA BOUNCE
idea: Color-match pinball: bounce the ball off same-color bumpers to build COMBO. COMBO >= 4 triggers SYNTHESIS super-mode (rainbow bumpers, 3x score). Reinterpreted from dice/bag roguelite idea (score 31.65) with synthesis compression + one-color-per-turn hooks.

title: COMBO BURST
idea: Color-match target shooting gallery: same-color consecutive hits build COMBO. COMBO >= 3 triggers CHAIN BURST cascading through nearby same-color targets. Reinterpreted from space-mining deckbuilder idea (score 31.8) with floor rule changes + chain collapse hooks.

title: COLOR FLUX
idea: One-button color-matching flyer: flap through colored gates, match your bird's color to build COMBO. COMBO >= 5 triggers SYNTHESIS super-mode (3x score, rainbow gates). Reinterpreted from dice/bag roguelite idea (score 31.65) with synthesis compression + one-color-per-turn hooks.

title: GEM CHAIN
idea: Color-match swap puzzle with chain-reaction spread: swap adjacent gems to create 3+ same-color lines, BFS spread clears adjacent same-color gems, cascading combos multiply score while building HEAT (board quakes at threshold). Reinterpreted from alchemy synthesis deckbuilder idea #1 (score 32.75) with synthesis compression → chain cascade, CA spread → BFS color propagation hooks.

title: FLUX CANNON
idea: Artillery chain-combo: aim and fire colored cannonballs at drifting targets, chain same-color hits for COMBO multipliers, COMBO >= 3 unlocks SUPER SHOT (AOE burst). Manage FOCUS (accuracy resource) and HEAT (overheat risk). Reinterpreted from deckbuilder idea #1 (score 32.05) with synthesis compression -> color-match COMBO chain, cost is future hand -> FOCUS accuracy mechanic.

title: PIPE SURGE
idea: Pipe connection puzzle: place colored pipe tiles to connect Source to Drain, same-color adjacent pipes in the path chain-propagate for COMBO multipliers. COMBO >= 4 triggers SURGE — all connected pipes burst with particles and clear for a massive bonus. Reinterpreted from dice/bag roguelite idea #1 (score 32.2) with log/replay as asset -> persistent pipe infrastructure, chain collapse -> color-match chain propagation.

title: CHROMA DRIVE
idea: Top-down color-match putting game: sink colored balls into matching holes for COMBO multipliers. Ball color updates to the last hole sunk, creating constraint-driven risk/reward. Reinterpreted from deckbuilder idea #1 (score 31.85) with log/replay as assets -> ball color determined by last sink, one-color-per-turn -> color-match constraint.

title: OVERKILL CHAIN
idea: Timing/precision overkill chain game: click enemies to attack, excess damage ripples left through the enemy line, building combos. Closer enemies = higher multiplier but more danger. Reinterpreted from auto-shooter idea #9 (score 30.8) with overkill carryover + combo meter hooks.

title: CHROMA DASH
idea: Side-scrolling endless runner: collect same-color gems consecutively to build COMBO multipliers. COMBO >= 5 triggers FLUX super-mode (rainbow aura, 3x gem value, 5 seconds). Jump over spikes and pits, duck under bars. Speed increases with distance. Reinterpreted from deckbuilder idea #1 (score 32.0) with synthesis compression -> COMBO chain, chain collapse -> FLUX activation explosion.

title: RESONANCE CHAIN
idea: Rhythm-action: hit falling colored notes at timing zone, consecutive same-color hits build RESONANCE chain for score multipliers and chain-clear effects. Reinterpreted from dice/bag roguelite idea #1 (score 32.2) with UI chain collapse + hit/combo visualization hooks.

title: HOOK CHAIN
idea: Color-match fishing: time your strikes to catch same-colored fish consecutively for COMBO multipliers. COMBO >= 3 triggers SUPER mode (rainbow hook, auto-catch all same-color fish). Reinterpreted from deckbuilder/logistics idea #1 (score 32.0) with synthesis compression -> same-color COMBO chain, flow optimization -> color target selection + heat/cooldown timing.

title: SPLIT CHAIN
idea: Asteroids-like shooter with color-match chain splitting. Same-color asteroid kills build COMBO for extra fragments and score multipliers. Reinterpreted from alchemy deckbuilder idea #1 (score 31.85) with log/replay as asset + one-color-per-turn hooks.

title: CHROMA CHASE
idea: Color-match maze chase (Pac-Man-like): eat same-colored gems consecutively for COMBO multipliers. Player movement trail damages ghosts. Ghosts multiply over time. Reinterpreted from dice/bag roguelite idea #1 (score 32.15) with log/replay as asset (trail defense) + CA grid spread (ghost multiplication) hooks.

title: ECHO ARC
idea: Color-match trajectory launcher (slingshot): aim and launch colored projectiles at targets, same-color hits build COMBO for SUPER SHOT. Each hit creates an echo ring (log/replay as asset) that amplifies subsequent shots.

title: BURST CHAIN
idea: Bubble shooter with chain-propagation popping: shoot colored bubbles at a hex-grid ceiling, match 3+ same-color to pop. Floating bubbles cascade down for bonus. COMBO multiplier rewards consecutive pops, HEAT accelerates ceiling drops. Reinterpreted from dice/bag roguelite idea (score 31.55) with chain propagation + one-color-per-turn hooks.

title: PONG SURGE
idea: Color-match Pong rally: rally the ball with matching paddle colors to build COMBO, trigger SURGE mode for double points and screen-shaking chain effects. Reinterpreted from deckbuilder idea #1 (score 32.6) with log/replay → rally history and chain collapse → SURGE mode hooks.

title: CHAIN CROSS
idea: Color-match traffic intersection manager: match signal colors to car colors for safe passage. Same-color consecutive passes build COMBO → SUPER CLEAR. Crashes spread congestion (CA reimagined). Reinterpreted from dice/bag roguelite idea #1 (score 32.35) with synthesis compression + CA grid spread hooks.

title: Tower Collapse
idea: Tower stack/collapse puzzle: drop blocks, match 3+ same-color adjacent, chain reactions cascade for score. Reinterpreted from game_idea_factory #1 (score 32.0, hacking/deckbuilder with synthesis+chain hooks).

title: ECHO STEALTH
idea: Top-down grid stealth: only one color of guard can see you at a time (cycling frequency). When caught, leave an echo behind that distracts same-color guards. Reinterpreted from alchemy deckbuilder idea #1 (score 31.85) with log/replay as asset + one-color-per-turn hooks.

title: STARFALL
idea: Color-match Missile Command defense: click to launch interceptors from cities, same-color consecutive intercepts build COMBO for surging score multipliers. Reinterpreted from calamity sealing deckbuilder idea (score 32.0) with synthesis compression + chain visualization hooks.

title: CUE CHAIN
idea: Color-match billiards: sink same-color balls consecutively for COMBO multipliers. COMBO >= 3 triggers CHAIN BREAK super-mode (rainbow cue, 3x score). Reinterpreted from deckbuilder roguelite idea #1 (score 31.8) with consecutive same-card -> same-color-COMBO, chain collapse UI -> CHAIN BREAK hooks.

title: MERGE TOWER
idea: Tower stacking merge puzzle: drop colored blocks, 3+ same-color blocks merge into higher tier, chain reactions cascade through tower. Reinterpreted from alchemy deckbuilder idea (score 31.85) with synthesis compression + split/converge hooks.

title: CHAIN JUGGLE
idea: Color-match juggling: keep colored balls in the air, chain same-color hits for COMBO, compress into SUPER BALLS, avoid rising hazard zone. Reinterpreted from alchemy deckbuilder idea #1 (Score 31.25) with synthesis compression + damage strengthens enemies hooks.
